frontmatter.title: 喫茶閃光でライブします

nodes.body:
久しぶりのセカンドワルツのライブです！場所はとてもおしゃれでメルヘンな雰囲気で最高な喫茶閃光です！！
ちよじギター&まちvo＋キーボードのアコースティック編成でライブを行います！！

[詳細](https://x.com/second_waltz_/status/1886756522618970162)

Second Waltz is finally playing live again! The venue is Kissa Senko, a wonderful café with a stylish, fairy-tale atmosphere.

We will perform as an acoustic duo: Chiyoji on guitar, and Machi on vocals and keyboard.

[Details](https://x.com/second_waltz_/status/1886756522618970162)
